prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 34827→9343→7516→5266→4867，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），近 3 年累计前移约 2649 名；2025 年基准约 4867 名；2021–2025 年本省物理类计划分别为 103→114→111→113→117 人，2026 年计划增至 138 人，较 2025 年扩招约 18%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 39 名，近年排名稳定在 38–41 区间，属全国顶尖理工类高校；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园霸凌事件），但抖音热度排名第 60（较热），整体关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；信息与通信工程 A+、电子科学与技术 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、网络空间安全 A、机械工程 A-，共 5 个 A- 及以上学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）等西电核心专业方向社 会热度持续偏高，有利于吸引高分考生；本省 2026 年考生总数约 218700 人，较 2025 年（约 179817 人）增加约 21.6%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 147600 人，较 2025 年增加约 21.5%，竞争显著加剧；学校位于陕西西安，与甘肃相邻，地域偏好有利。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+18%）及本省考生明显增加（+21.5%）三方面因素：扩招使位次后移（数字增大），考生增加进一步加剧竞争，而优势专业高热度对位次有前拉作用。经权衡，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 5421 名，区间 4921–5921 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）（通信）
- 电子信息类（微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）（集成电路）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 计算机类（信息安全、网络空间安全）（网络安全）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程等）（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）（电子工程）
- 自动化类（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计、自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）（智能制造及智能测控）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、电子信息材料、智能材料与结构）（电子材料与微纳器件）
- 生物医学工程类（生物医学工程、智能医学工程）（电子信息交叉融合班）
- 管理科学与工程类（信息管理与信息系统、工业工程、大数据管理与应用）（数字化与商务智能融合培养）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 4921–5921 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如 4900 名以内）可重点冲击一档的通信、集成电路、计算机等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如 5900 名左右）应以三档专业保底为主，争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 34827→9343→7516→5266→4867, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 2649 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4867; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 103→114→111→113→117 respectively, and the 2026 plan increases to 138, an expansion of about 18% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and has a notable impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 38–41 range in recent years, belonging to the top national science and engineering universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus bullying incident), but Douyin popularity ranks 60th (relatively hot), overall attention is acceptable; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 disciplines rated A- or above, highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) and other core majors of Xidian have consistently high social popularity, helping to attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,817), with an estimated Physics Category candidates of about 147,600 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, which is favorable for regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+18%), and the notable increase in provincial candidates (+21.5%): expansion pushes rankings backward (increasing numbers), the increase in candidates further intensifies competition, while the high popularity of advantageous majors pulls rankings forward. After weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 5421, with a range of 4921–5921.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology) (Communication)
- Electronic Information (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems) (Integrated Circuits)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Computer Science (Information Security, Cyberspace Security) (Network Security)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.) (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology) (Electronic Engineering)
- Automation (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.) (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Materials, Smart Materials and Structures) (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices)
- Biomedical Engineering (Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering) (Electronic Information Cross-Fusion Class)
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Industrial Engineering, Big Data Management and Application) (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4921–5921, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4900), you can focus on targeting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Communication, Integrated Circuits, and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 5900), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options while striving for Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025 年历史类（含文科）最低位次依次约 2392→1700→1617，呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），近 2 年累计前移约 775 名；2025 年基准约 1617 名；2023–2025 年本省历史类计划分别为 5→4→4 人，2026 年计划仍为 4 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 39 名，属全国顶尖理工类高校，但文科专业规模极小；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园霸凌事件），抖音热度排名第 60（较热）；未见明显投档断档记录；西电优势学科集中在电子信息、计算机等理工领域，历史类招生专业（外国语言文学类、工商管理类）与学校核心优势学 科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外国语言文学类社会热度一般观望，工商管理类社会热度分化观望，整体吸引力有限；本省 2026 年考生总数约 218700 人，按历史比例估算历史类考生约 71000 人，较 2025 年（约 58374 人）增加约 21.6%，竞争加剧；学校位于陕西西安，与甘肃相邻，地域偏好有利。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平及本省考生明显增加（+21.6%）三方面因素：计划持平无扩招缓冲，考生增加使竞争加剧，但西电文科规模小且与学校核心优势关联弱，对高分文科考生吸引力有 限。经权衡，预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 1637 名，区间 1391–1883 名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类招生专业仅 2 个，位次在预测区间 1391–1883 名内，建议以工商管理类为主力、外国语言文学类保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如 1400 名以内）可争取工商管理类；位次接近区间上限（如 1800 名左右）以外语类保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2392→1700→1617, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 775 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1617; from 2023 to 2025, the provincial History Category enrollment plans were 5→4→4, and the 2026 plan remains 4, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a top national science and engineering university, but with a very small liberal arts program; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus bullying incident), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 60 (relatively hot); no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Xidian's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in electronic information, computer science, etc., while the History Category enrollment majors (Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration) are weakly related to the school's core strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign Languages and Literature has generally lukewarm social popularity, Business Administration has divided and cautious social popularity, overall appeal is limited; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 218,700, with an estimated 71,000 History Category examinees based on historical proportions, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 58,374), intensifying competition; the university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, which is favorable for regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase in provincial examinees (+21.6%): the unchanged plan provides no buffer from expansion, the increase in examinees intensifies competition, but Xidian's liberal arts program is small and weakly related to the school's core strengths, limiting its appeal to high-scoring liberal arts examinees. After weighing, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is about 1637, with a range of 1391–1883.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category, with rankings within the predicted range of 1391–1883. It is recommended to prioritize Business Administration as the main choice and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1400) can aim for Business Administration; rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., around 1800) should mainly rely on Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety.
